_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for all image URLs. Other files reference images by key (e.g. 'IMG.hero.fermentation') instead of URL.
_meta.howToUse: When you need to swap images (Picsum → real photos), edit only this file. The information.json references images by key, so no need to touch it.
_meta.currentStrategy: Picsum (random seeded) for photos, inline SVG for logos and cert badges. All hotlink-friendly.

logo.primary: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 120 28'><rect width='22' height='22' x='2' y='3' fill='%231F4D3D'/><text x='30' y='20' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' font-size='13' font-weight='500' letter-spacing='0.05em' fill='%231A1A1A'>YEAST.BIO</text></svg>
logo.white: data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 120 28'><rect width='22' height='22' x='2' y='3' fill='%23FFFFFF'/><text x='30' y='20' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' font-size='13' font-weight='500' letter-spacing='0.05em' fill='%23FFFFFF'>YEAST.BIO</text></svg>

product._note: Product images intentionally use local paths — replace with studio shots before launch

ogImage._note: Open Graph images for social sharing — need custom design with brand colors before launch

certBadge._note: Inline SVG badges with cert code text. Always work, no external dependency.
